narrative: Fed hawkish hold drives USD/JPY to 160.57 as dot plot shifts signal higher-for-longer path; 275bp Fed-BoJ carry sustains the bid despite intervention risk above 160.00. Dollar firms as equities slide and gold slumps -1.09% near $4,334; equities -1.21%; DXY +0.16%; VIX 18.4. USD/JPY options market shows moderate put skew (25d RR -1.09) as VRP hits +4.9pt, signaling high demand for downside protection. Watch BoE Rate Decision and SNB Meeting at 11:00 and 07:30 UTC.
